reportedIssues: Multiple horizontal sections overflow the viewport. The top category pill for “Hot Games” is cut off, and the rightmost game cards in the game rows are partially cropped off-screen.
The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game grid content, hiding parts of the cards near the bottom of the screen.
The top category navigation looks visually cramped, with the last visible item truncated abruptly at the right edge.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a wrong Jackpots category being highlighted; they address layout overflow, navigation bar overlap, and visual cramping instead.
